objective: Advance the FigOps roadmap autonomously by completing the safest high-value decomposition slice, preserving compatibility exports, and verifying with focused regression tests.

assumptions.claim: The safest current roadmap slice is to finish D2 data-contract semantic helper extraction before larger render_csv or bridge_renderer work.
assumptions.verification: Confirmed against local hotspot inventory and two read-only explorer audits.

assumptions.claim: Private compatibility paths through hub_core.data_contract and hub_core.data_contract_semantics must remain importable.
assumptions.verification: Preserved aliases and ran focused data-contract and MCP tests.

phases.entry: Dirty working tree with prior remediation changes present.
actions: Spawn read-only explorer agents for D2 compatibility and remaining roadmap priorities.
phases.exit: Select bounded, testable first-wave implementation slice.

actions: Extract calculation-check sidecar and JSON-safe utilities.
phases.exit: Code compiles and focused tests pass.

actions: Run py_compile on touched modules and related tests.
phases.exit: No focused regression failures; residual risks recorded.

phases.entry: Explorer outputs and test results available.
phases.exit: Final handoff includes completed work, verification evidence, and remaining roadmap.

parallelism.fan_in_rule: Explorer outputs are advisory; implementation proceeds only on non-overlapping D2 files and fan-in occurs before final summary.

verification: py_compile on touched modules and related test files

risk_gates.default: Do not install; use existing external FigOps virtualenv.

risk_gates.risk: Destructive git cleanup or reverting unrelated dirty files
risk_gates.default: Do not revert; preserve existing user/generated changes.

risk_gates.risk: Large render_csv or bridge_renderer refactor with visual/API drift
risk_gates.default: Defer until D2 focused verification is green.

budget.test_scope: Focused regression before any full-suite expansion

next_resume_points: The active D1-D6 primary-hotspot decomposition track is closed; start future work from the live docs/architecture.md inventory
Treat remaining over-budget files as separate maintenance candidates with their own witness tests
